creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Explore the fascinating world of illusions at @museumofillusions_dubai!

Highlights of our visit:
* Over 60 mind bending displays
* Immersive rooms; an upside down train cabin, a distorted room, vortex tunnel, anti-gravity room, and more! 
* Fun photo corners
* Visual and sensory experiences 

Tag your family and friends!

📍 @alseefdubai 

🕙 10AM – 10PM Monday to Thursday, 10AM – 11PM Friday, Saturday, Sunday (and Public Holidays)

🎟️ Ticket prices as of Feb 2023
Adult: AED 80 Student/Senior: AED 70 Child (5-15 years): AED 60 Child (below 5 years): FREE Family (2 adults + 2 children): AED 225 Family & Friends (5 tickets – adults or kids): AED 340
